name: unlikelyland
description: UnlikelyLand — a persistent weird-comedy multiplayer text RPG

scripts.build: npm run build -w @unlikelyland/contracts && npm run build -w @unlikelyland/api && npm run build -w @unlikelyland/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @unlikelyland/contracts && npm run test -w @unlikelyland/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @unlikelyland/contracts && npm run typecheck -w @unlikelyland/api && npm run typecheck -w @unlikelyland/web
